name: HREVN MCP Server
description: Thin MCP server for HREVN baseline diagnostics, profile validation, evidence bundle generation, and bundle verification, backed by the live managed runtime at https://api.hrevn.com.

environment.name: HREVN_API_BASE_URL
environment.description: Base URL for the live HREVN managed runtime.

environment.name: HREVN_API_KEY
environment.description: API key for the HREVN managed runtime.

tools.name: baseline_check
tools.description: Run a HREVN baseline diagnostic before a consequential workflow step.

tools.name: profile_validate
tools.description: Validate a HREVN profile payload more deeply once the workflow profile is known.

tools.name: generate_bundle
tools.description: Generate a tamper-evident HREVN evidence bundle from a record and traces.

tools.name: verify_bundle
tools.description: Verify a HREVN evidence bundle by source path or bundle artifact path.
